title: Norway's crown princess on lung transplant waiting list, palace says
summary_full: Mette-Marit's condition, which stiffens the lungs, making it hard to breathe, has deteriorated, the royal household says.
summary_public: Mette-Marit's condition, which stiffens the lungs, making it hard to breathe, has deteriorated, the royal household says.
